# PHIL.197 ? Single-Threaded Leadership

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** operating_principles
**Subcategory:** single_threaded_leadership
**Domain:** OPERATING_PRINCIPLES
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Important initiatives deserve dedicated leadership focus

## Application
Assign dedicated leaders, avoid split attention on critical projects, resource appropriately
